column6:
PMD (Pressure Makes Diamonds) is a streetwear brand built around ambition, resilience and self-belief.  
The brand represents people who keep pushing through pressure, struggle and challenges to become stronger and stand out.

Our mission is to create bold, high-quality streetwear that inspires confidence and individuality.

Our vision is to grow PMD into a globally recognized streetwear movement known for strong identity, creativity and culture.
column7:
Delivery time:
Orders are processed within 1–3 business days. Delivery time depends on location.

Return policy:
Returns or exchanges are only accepted for damaged or incorrect items within 3 days after delivery.

Payment methods:
Paystack, Bank Transfer and Debit/Credit Card payments.

Sizing guide:
Oversized/streetwear fit. Customers are advised to check the size chart before ordering.
